subject.descriptionZh: 机械、材料、土木等工学基础题。
subject.descriptionJa: 機械、材料、土木などの工学基礎。
subject.descriptionEn: Foundational engineering problems in mechanics, materials, civil engineering, and related fields.

Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.subject: Engineering
Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.descriptionZh: 应力、应变、梁、材料变形与强度。
Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.descriptionJa: 応力、ひずみ、梁、材料変形、強度。
Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.descriptionEn: Stress, strain, beams, material deformation, and strength.

Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.subject: Engineering
Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.descriptionZh: 流体运动、波动、连续介质与工程流动问题。
Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.descriptionJa: 流体運動、波動、連続体、工学的な流れ問題。
Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.descriptionEn: Fluid motion, waves, continua, and engineering flow problems.

Engineering.Materials-Science.subject: Engineering
Engineering.Materials-Science.descriptionZh: 材料结构、性质、相变与材料工程基础。
Engineering.Materials-Science.descriptionJa: 材料構造、性質、相転移、材料工学基礎。
Engineering.Materials-Science.descriptionEn: Material structures, properties, phase transitions, and materials engineering basics.
